_comment: Manual license determinations for packages whose PyPI metadata exposes no
usable SPDX identifier (License field empty, 'UNKNOWN', or carrying the full
license text instead of an id). generate_licenses.sh applies these to the
License field across summary.md, details.json and Third_party_attr.txt.
Each entry was verified against the package's bundled LICENSE file (or, where
no file ships, the upstream/EULA noted in 'evidence'). Matching is by
case-insensitive name with '_' and '-' treated alike. Update when versions
change or new UNKNOWN/full-text packages appear in the reviewer report.

ase_db_backends.evidence: bundled LICENSE: 'GNU Lesser General Public License ... version 2.1 ... or (at your option) any later version'

torch-ema.evidence: bundled LICENSE: MIT permission grant (Copyright 2019 Samuel G. Fadel)

cuda-toolkit.evidence: no license file shipped in the wheel; governed by the NVIDIA CUDA Toolkit EULA: https://docs.nvidia.com/cuda/eula/

cuequivariance-ops-cu12.evidence: License field: 'LICENSE AGREEMENT FOR NVIDIA MATH LIBRARIES SOFTWARE DEVELOPMENT KITS'

cuequivariance-ops-cu13.evidence: License field: 'LICENSE AGREEMENT FOR NVIDIA MATH LIBRARIES SOFTWARE DEVELOPMENT KITS'

cuequivariance-ops-torch-cu12.evidence: License field: 'Other/Proprietary License (NVIDIA Proprietary Software)' + NVIDIA Math Libraries SDK agreement

cuequivariance-ops-torch-cu13.evidence: License field: 'Other/Proprietary License (NVIDIA Proprietary Software)' + NVIDIA Math Libraries SDK agreement

matscipy.evidence: License field: 'GNU LESSER GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE Version 2.1 ... or (at your option) any later version'
